homepage.tagline: The comprehensive appointment management platform that connects organizations, service providers, and clients seamlessly
homepage.powerfulSolution: A powerful, all-in-one solution for appointment management
homepage.description: Booking for All is a comprehensive appointment management system designed to streamline the way organizations, service providers, and clients interact. Whether you're running a healthcare facility, a consulting firm, a beauty salon, or any service-based business, our platform provides the tools you need to manage appointments efficiently.
homepage.platformSupports: Our platform supports multiple user roles, each with tailored features:
homepage.organizationsFeature: Organizations can create departments, manage providers, and control their entire booking ecosystem
homepage.providersFeature: Service Providers can set their availability, manage their calendar, and connect with clients
homepage.clientsFeature: Clients can easily find providers, book appointments, and manage their bookings
homepage.adminsFeature: Administrators have full system control to manage organizations and platform settings
homepage.secureDescription: Enterprise-grade security with role-based access control
homepage.multiOrganizationDescription: Support for multiple organizations with independent management
homepage.teamManagementDescription: Organize providers into departments and manage teams efficiently
homepage.smartSchedulingDescription: Intelligent calendar management with real-time availability
homepage.joinThousands: Join thousands of organizations already using Booking for All

providerAbout.title: About - Provider Portal
providerAbout.subtitle: Everything you need to know about managing your appointments as a service provider.
providerAbout.whatIsDescription: Booking for All is an appointment management platform that connects service providers like you with clients. Your organization has set you up as a provider so that clients can book appointments with you directly.
providerAbout.whatIsDetail: As a provider, you control your own availability. You create time slots on your calendar, and clients can browse and book the ones that work for them. You receive notifications when bookings are made or cancelled.
providerAbout.setAvailabilityDesc: Open your calendar and click on time slots to mark when you are available for appointments.
providerAbout.receiveBookingsDesc: Clients see your available slots and can book directly. You get an email notification for every new booking.
providerAbout.manageScheduleDesc: View all your upcoming appointments, check who booked, and keep track of your day from the dashboard.
providerAbout.stayInformedDesc: Get email notifications for new bookings and cancellations so you are always up to date.
providerAbout.step1: Go to your Dashboard (Home) to see your stats and quick actions.
providerAbout.step2: Open the Calendar to create your available time slots.
providerAbout.step3: Wait for clients to book your slots — you will be notified by email.
providerAbout.step4: Check your Dashboard regularly to stay on top of upcoming appointments.
